subject: Natural Sciences
title: Life Cycles
tagline: Trace the life cycles of frogs, butterflies, plants and humans!

steps.label: Egg
steps.description: The life cycle begins as an egg.

steps.label: Larva
steps.description: The egg hatches into a larva that eats and grows.

steps.label: Growth
steps.description: The larva grows and moults its skin several times.

steps.label: Pupa
steps.description: The larva forms a pupa (chrysalis or cocoon).

steps.label: Adult
steps.description: An adult emerges from the pupa, fully formed.

steps.label: Reproduce
steps.description: The adult reproduces, and the cycle begins again.
